opening_line: The hallway is longer tonight. You measured it last month. Measure it again.
notes_for_player: Mimic-adjacent caller. Feed still shows measurable expansion.

questions.label: Ask location
questions.response: Second floor. All of it. Every door farther away than before.

questions.label: Ask appearance
questions.response: No one. Just distance that wasn't there.

questions.label: Ask timeline
questions.response: Since you sat down. Since you started watching.
